title: Mario Kart Wii Wi-Fi Races
description:
This is a series of three races me and my friends had tonight.  Well, it was four races, but I couldn't get the video capture device set up in time for the first race.  However, I remember the statistics.

Me - Funky Kong (Flame Runner/Bowser Bike)
Gustavo - Daisy (Dolphin Dasher)
Andi - Mario (Mach Bike)

1st race: DS Delfino Square

1st place: Me
2nd place: Gustavo
3rd place: Andi

2nd race: DK Summit

1st place: Me
2nd place: Gustavo
3rd place: Andi

3rd race: Toad's Factory

1st place: Gustavo
2nd place: Me
3rd place: Andi

4th race: Daisy Circuit

1st place: Gustavo
2nd place: Me
3rd place: Andi

It says that I won, but me and Gus tied.  Also, Andi doesn't play this game as much as we do.  Gustavo, on the other hand, is really good, and I usually compete with him for faster time trials.

There are some shortcuts that we use; it could help you if you watched.  I don't even know the shortcut that Gustavo used towards the end of Daisy Circuit, though.  I still have to look that up.

I could have uploaded these races seperately, but then you would have to watch the intro all three times, just because I'm evil like that.

And yeah, the music doesn't perfectly sync up with the video; my video capture device just does that, and I don't know why.  It's synced at the beginning of each race because I recorded each race separately, and put them together for the movie.
